## FAQ


### What is Aircove?

Aircove is our range of pioneering VPN routers, complete with built-in VPN protection. We launched Aircove in late 2022, as the first and only wireless internet router designed to connect to ExpressVPN right out of the box. In 2024, we introduced Aircove Go, a travel Wi-Fi router with the same VPN integration as Aircove but now with increased portability and new exclusive features.

Apart from VPN support, the Aircove range also comes with built-in [advanced protection features](https://www.expressvpn.com/aircove/how-it-works): [Threat Manager](https://www.expressvpn.com/features/threat-manager), an ad blocker, and parental controls. These are designed to work seamlessly with the VPN, providing easy, always-on protection with one easy-to-use router—wherever you are.


### How is Aircove different from other routers?

While any router can provide internet access, our Aircove range of VPN routers goes one better: It instantly brings all the [benefits of ExpressVPN](https://www.expressvpn.com/what-is-vpn#benefits-of-a-vpn) to everything on your network. If it’s connected, it’s protected. You don’t need to install ExpressVPN on any other device, if you don’t want to.

Aircove has also been built with security top of mind. An [audit conducted by cybersecurity firm Cure53](https://www.expressvpn.com/blog/cure53-audits-expressvpn-aircove-confirming-the-routers-security-excellence/) confirmed that our home VPN router, Aircove, has a robust level of security.


### Do I need an ExpressVPN subscription if I have an Aircove router?

Though Aircove and Aircove Go come with ExpressVPN preinstalled, you still need to activate your router with an ongoing subscription.

But even without an active ExpressVPN subscription, your router will continue to perform standard Wi-Fi and network functions, and its advanced protection features will operate as normal.


### Do I need a separate subscription to use Threat Manager, the ad blocker, or parental controls?

No, these features are included with your Aircove or Aircove Go router.


### Can I use Aircove/Aircove Go’s Threat Manager, ad blocker, and parental controls without the VPN?

Yes, these features can be used with or without the VPN.


### What is a portable/travel VPN router?

A portable/travel VPN router is a compact and travel-friendly device that is pre-configured to support a VPN connection.

For users who want to enhance the security and privacy of their internet connections while on the go, especially when connecting to public Wi-Fi networks in hotels, airports, cafes, and other public spaces, a portable/travel VPN router is a must.


### Do I need a portable Wi-Fi router if I have a VPN?

If you have multiple devices that need VPN protection, a portable Wi-Fi router with built-in VPN, like Aircove Go, could be useful because you can connect multiple devices to the VPN simultaneously instead of configuring the VPN on individual devices. A portable VPN router also adds an extra layer of security to your connection, protecting you from potentially unsecure public Wi-Fi networks.

When you have a portable VPN router, all your devices will remember and rejoin the network automatically. So in each new hotel room, holiday rental, or co-working space, you just need to connect your VPN router, and every other device you have gets connected without having to sign in separately.


### Should I use a portable VPN router in a hotel or holiday rental?

Yes, using a portable VPN router when connecting to public Wi-Fi networks in hotels and holiday rentals is recommended.

Public Wi-Fi networks in hotels can be less secure, making your data vulnerable to potential threats like hacking or snooping. A VPN router encrypts your internet connection and masks your IP address, preventing third parties like the hotel's network administrators from monitoring your online activity.

Using a VPN router, as opposed to connecting to the VPN via a separate app, lets you instantly and automatically secure all your connected devices. This affords you unparalleled convenience that might come in handy when you’re traveling!


### How do I set up a VPN with a travel router on hotel Wi-Fi?

Setup instructions vary based on the router and VPN service you're using, but in general, you’ll need a travel router that supports VPN connections, such as Aircove Go, as well as a subscription with a VPN service that supports router connections.

[Check out our setup guide for Aircove Go](https://www.expressvpn.com/support/vpn-setup/how-to-set-up-expressvpn-aircove/)


### Do I need an internet service provider (ISP) with Aircove?

Yes, if you are using Aircove at home, you will need an ISP to connect to the internet. Your ISP gives your home access to the internet, while Aircove distributes the internet access to all your connected devices.


### Do I need a Netflix/HBO/Prime Video/other streaming service account if I have an Aircove router?

If you want to access streaming content, yes. Aircove and Aircove Go do not come with any streaming accounts, so if you don’t already have a subscription to Netflix, HBO, Hulu, Prime Video, or any other paid streaming service, you’ll need to sign up separately.


### Is Aircove/Aircove Go a Wi-Fi mesh system?

No, Aircove/Aircove Go is a single router where all wireless traffic and requests pass through one access point. If you have an existing mesh system, Aircove/Aircove Go can be connected to one of the nodes with the highest concentration of devices that you want to protect with a VPN.


### What internet speeds will I get with Aircove/Aircove Go?

​​In our testing, Aircove/Aircove Go’s high-performance quad-core CPU enables download speeds of up to 910 Mbps over Ethernet and 615 Mbps over Wi-Fi with VPN disconnected.

When the VPN is in use, Aircove/Aircove Go offers speeds of up to 330 Mbps for multiple devices simultaneously. (For reference, 4K streaming typically requires download speeds of 25 Mbps, while HD requires 5 Mbps.)

When Wi-Fi Link is in use, Aircove Go offers speeds of up to 250 Mbps. Using Wi-Fi Link can limit your speeds because it is doubling the Wi-Fi transmission path between your device and the internet.

Maximums are based on ideal use conditions. Actual range and performance depend on your internet service provider, home size, layout, device usage, building materials, and obstructions.

[Read the full specifications.](https://www.expressvpn.com/aircove/specs)


### How many VPN server locations can you use with Aircove/Aircove Go?

ExpressVPN has VPN servers in 113 countries, including the [UK](https://www.expressvpn.com/vpn-server/uk-vpn), [U.S.](https://www.expressvpn.com/vpn-server/us-vpn), [Canada](https://www.expressvpn.com/vpn-server/canada-vpn), [Australia](https://www.expressvpn.com/vpn-server/australia-vpn), and many more. See the full list of  [VPN server locations](https://www.expressvpn.com/vpn-server).


### How do I know Aircove/Aircove Go is secure?

Security is at the forefront of what we do at ExpressVPN. Not only do we aim to design our apps and systems to offer a high level of privacy and security, but we also routinely engage independent auditors to validate our security claims. It’s one of the best ways for our users to know if they can trust our services to protect them. [See the full list of audits](https://www.expressvpn.com/trust#security-audits) and read the full reports.


### What support does ExpressVPN offer for Aircove/Aircove Go?

ExpressVPN provides a [wide range of articles](https://www.expressvpn.com/support/aircove) covering setup, usage, and troubleshooting. If you need more support, the ExpressVPN Support Team is always available.


### Is Aircove/Aircove Go compatible with gaming consoles?

Yes, Aircove/Aircove Go is compatible with major gaming consoles like [PlayStation](https://www.expressvpn.com/gaming/playstation) and [Xbox.](https://www.expressvpn.com/gaming/xbox#gaming-with-vpn) Simply connect your gaming devices to Aircove router's Wi-Fi to enjoy ExpressVPN benefits.


### Does Aircove support Dedicated IP?

No. Dedicated IP is not supported on Aircove or Aircove Go routers. It can only be used on ExpressVPN apps for Windows, macOS, Linux, Android, and iOS.

## Hvad er en VPN?

En **VPN**, eller **virtuelt privat netværk**, er en sikker tunnel mellem din enhed og internettet. VPN'er beskytter dig mod nysgerrige øjne, indblanding og censur.

Når du opretter forbindelse til en sikker VPN-server, føres din internettrafik gennem en krypteret tunnel, som ikke er synlig for andre – inklusive hackere, regeringer og din internetudbyder.

## Fordele ved en VPN


### Skift din lokation

En VPN **ændrer din IP-adresse**, som er et unikt nummer, der identificerer dig, og hvor du er i verden. En ny IP-adresse gør det meget sværere at fastslå din identitet og rigtige lokation, så du kan søge online med større anonymitet. Med ExpressVPN kan du få det til at se ud som om at du er i Storbritannien, USA., Canada, Australien eller ethvert af de andre [113 lande](https://www.expressvpn.com/dk/vpn-server), herunder Danmark.


### Beskyt dit privatliv

Ændring af din IP-adresse med en VPN hjælper med at **skjule din identitet** fra hjemmesider, apps og tjenester, der vil spore dig. Gode VPN'er skjuler også din aktivitet for din internetudbyder, mobiludbyder og andre, der muligvis lytter med, takket være et lag af stærk kryptering.


### Øg din sikkerhed

En VPN **beskytter dig mod mange forskellige sikkerhedsbrud. **Det gælder bl.a. packet sniffing, ubeskyttede wi-fi-netværk og man-in-the-middle-angreb. Rejsende, fjernarbejdere og alle andre brugere, der er på farten, bruger en VPN, når de forbinder til et upålideligt netværk som f.eks. gratis offentlige wi-fi-netværk.

[[Prøv ExpressVPN uden risiko](https://www.expressvpn.com/dk/pricing)](https://www.expressvpn.com/dk/pricing)
## Hvornår skal jeg bruge en VPN?

Hvis databeskyttelse er vigtigt for dig, skal du bruge en VPN, **hver gang du opretter forbindelse til internettet**. En VPN-app kører i baggrunden på din enhed, så den ikke kommer i vejen, mens du bruger andre apps og surfer på internettet. Og du vil have ro i sindet vel vidende, at dit privatliv altid er beskyttet.

Men her er nogle situationer, hvor en VPN er særligt nyttig:


- Når du rejser

At udforske verden er ikke ensbetydende med, at du skal ændre den måde, du bruger internettet på. Med en VPN kan du gå online, som om du stadig er i dit hjemland, uanset hvor du rejser hen.
- Når du har det sjovt

En VPN giver dig mulighed for at nyde de hjemmesider og tjenester, du kan lide, uden begrænsninger, der kan forringe din oplevelse eller direkte blokering fra din internetudbyder eller dit lokale wi-fi-netværk.
- Når du bruger offentligt wi-fi

Dine personlige oplysninger er mere udsatte, når du opretter forbindelse til offentlige wi-fi-hotspots som f.eks. på caféer, i lufthavne og parker. En VPN beskytter dine enheder med stærk kryptering.
- Når du spiller

En VPN låser op for spil, kort, skins og andre tilføjelser, der muligvis er begrænset på dit netværk. Det beskytter dig også mod DDoS-angreb og reducerer ping og forsinkelse.
- Når du deler filer

P2P-fildeling betyder normalt, at fremmede kan se din IP-adresse og muligvis spore dine downloads. En VPN skjuler din IP-adresse, så du kan downloade med større anonymitet.
- Når du shopper

Nogle onlineshops viser forskellige priser for folk i forskellige lande. Med en VPN kan du finde de bedste tilbud i verden, uanset hvor du shopper fra.


## Hvordan fungerer en VPN?

Det er lettere at forstå, hvordan en VPN fungerer, når du ved, hvordan din internetforbindelse fungerer uden.


### Uden en VPN

Når du tilgår en hjemmeside uden en VPN, bliver du forbundet til den pågældende hjemmeside via din internetudbyder. Internetudbyderen tildeler dig en **unik IP-adresse**, der kan bruges til at identificere dig på hjemmesiden. Da din internetudbyder håndterer og dirigerer al din trafik, kan udbyderen se, hvilke sider du besøger. Og din aktivitet kan knyttes til dig af den unikke IP-adresse.


### Med en VPN

Når du opretter forbindelse til internettet med en VPN, opretter VPN-appen på din enhed (også kaldet en **VPN-klient**) en sikker forbindelse til en **VPN-server**. Din trafik sendes stadig gennem din internetudbyder, men din internetudbyder kan ikke længere læse den eller se dens endelige destination. De sider, du besøger, kan ikke længere se din oprindelige IP-adresse, kun IP-adressen på VPN-serveren, som deles af mange andre brugere og ændres regelmæssigt.


- Not Connected                    
                    
                        Connected
- 


### Proxying

VPN-serveren fungerer som en **proxy** eller stand-in for din webaktivitet: I stedet for din rigtige IP-adresse og lokation vil hjemmesider, du besøger, kun se IP-adressen og placeringen af VPN-serveren.

Dette gør dig mere **anonym** på internettet.


### Autentificering

Etablering af en sikker forbindelse er et problem, der løses ved hjælp af smart matematk i en proces, der kaldes **autentificering**.

Når autentificeringen er sket, kan VPN-klienten og VPN-serveren være sikre på, at de taler med hinanden og ingen anden.


### Tunneling

VPN'er beskytter også forbindelsen mellem klient og server med tunneling og kryptering.

Tunneling er en proces, hvor hver datapakke er **indkapslet** i en anden datapakke. Det gør det sværere for en tredjepart at læse dem i transit.


### Kryptering

Data inde i tunnelen er også **krypteret** således, at det kun er den tiltænkte modtager, der kan dekryptere dem. Det holder indholdet af din internettrafik helt privat. Selv din internetudbyder kan ikke se den.

[[Prøv ExpressVPN uden risiko](https://www.expressvpn.com/dk/pricing)](https://www.expressvpn.com/dk/pricing)
## VPN-typer


- Kommerciel VPN

En kommerciel VPN, også kaldet en personlig VPN eller en forbruger-VPN, er en privat tjeneste, der tilbydes direkte til enkeltpersoner, normalt mod betaling.
ExpressVPN er en kommerciel VPN-tjeneste, da den direkte henvender sig til sine kunders databeskyttelsesbehov.
- VPN til virksomheder

En VPN til virksomheder giver en organisations eksterne medarbejdere mulighed for at oprette en sikker forbindelse til internettet, som om de var fysisk til stede på kontoret.
I modsætning til kommercielle VPN'er er det dog meningen, at virksomhedens VPN'er skal beskytte virksomhedens data og ikke nødvendigvis medarbejderens.
- VPN med selvopsætning

Nogle IT-eksperter og gør-det-selv-entusiaster vælger at oprette deres egen VPN med eget udstyr.
VPN'er med selvopsætning giver dog ikke beskyttelse af delte IP-adresser, serverplaceringer i flere forskellige lande eller de mange andre funktioner, som kommercielle VPN-brugere har.


## Ofte stillede spørgsmål


### Hvordan vælger jeg en VPN?

Den vigtigste faktor, man skal overveje, når man vælger en VPN-tjeneste, er pålidelighed. En pålidelig VPN-tjeneste:


er transparent i sin privatpolitik
er uafhængigt revideret
designer sine systemer til at undgå lagring af personlige data
viser en konsekvent forpligtelse til privatliv på internettet og digital frihed


Vælg også din VPN baseret på de funktioner, du har brug for, såsom VPN-serverplaceringer, kompatibilitet med alle de enheder, du ejer, og ubegrænset båndbredde.


### Hvorfor bør jeg betale for en VPN?

Det er svært for en gratis VPN at matche de funktioner og tjenester, som en betalt udbyder af god kvalitet tilbyder. Gratis VPN'er leverer mere sandsynligt en middelmådig oplevelse med forbindelser, der er ødelagte af en overflod af brugere, dårlig kundeservice, begrænset eller ringe sikkerhed og få VPN-serverplaceringer, som du kan vælge imellem.
ExpressVPN er en betalt udbyder, som tilbyder forbindelser, der er optimeret til hastighed, sikkerhed og stabilitet, samt et bredt udvalg af serverplaceringer i 113 lande over hele verden. Derudover er vores dedikerede supportteam klar til at hjælpe dig døgnet rundt.


### Er VPN'er lovlige?

VPN'er er lovlige, og de bruges konsekvent af enkeltpersoner og virksomheder over hele verden til at beskytte deres personlige oplysninger, og onlineaktivitet. Det gælder bl.a. i lande med meget restriktive regeringer. Selv i lande, hvor man er imod VPN'er, tillader mange regeringer at embedsmænd, akademikere eller virksomhedsledere bruger VPN’er for at være konkurrencedygtige med resten af verden. Det er ikke praktisk for lande at forbyde alle VPN'er.
Når det er sagt, er ulovlig onlineaktivitet stadig ulovlig, uanset om du bruger en VPN eller ej.


### Kan jeg bruge en VPN på mobil? Hvorfor skulle jeg gøre det?

ExpressVPN har apps til iOS og Android og er derfor let at bruge på mobile enheder. Efterhånden som mere af vores digitale aktivitet som bl.a. netbank, streaming og beskeder foregår på telefoner og tablets, er det endnu vigtigere at beskytte dine data med en VPN på disse enheder, især når du bruger et offentligt wi-fi.


### Vil en VPN gøre min forbindelse langsommere?

VPN'er kan potentielt gøre din internethastighed langsommere, men ExpressVPN's brancheførende hastigheder betyder, at du som bruger sjældent mærker en forskel. Faktisk kan brug af en VPN forbedre din forbindelse, hvis din internetudbyder har begrænset din trafik.
Hvis du bemærker, at din forbindelse er langsommere, kan du prøve at vælge en serverplacering, der er tættere på din geografiske placering.


### Dræner VPN'er batteriet?

Som alle andre apps bruger en VPN en vis mængde strøm på din enhed. Det er en af grundene til, at ExpressVPN udviklede Lightway, vores eksklusive, specialbyggede nye VPN-protokol, der er designet til at bruge betydeligt mindre batteri end andre protokoller. Den er også hurtigere og lettere at kontrollere og vedligeholde.


### Kan man spores, hvis man bruger en VPN?

Hos ExpressVPN går vi ind for, at alle har ret til privatliv . Når du opretter forbindelse til vores netværk, forhindrer en stærk kryptering din aktivitet i at blive observeret af din internetudbyder, wi-fi-operatører eller andre tredjeparter. ExpressVPN indsamler ingen aktivitets- eller forbindelseslogfiler, og vores banebrydende TrustedServer-teknologi sikrer, at der aldrig gemmes data på servere. Kort sagt kan ingen specifik netværksaktivitet eller adfærd spores til en ExpressVPN-bruger.


### Er det sikkert at bruge en VPN til netbank?

Ikke nok med at det er sikkert at bruge en VPN, men det kan også tilføje et ekstra lag af beskyttelse til din netbank, især hvis du bruger offentlige wi-fi-netværk. Og da nogle pengeinstitutter suspenderer adgangen til brugere, når det ser ud til, at nogen forsøger at logge ind på deres konto fra et uventet sted, kan du redde dig selv fra at blive låst ude ved at oprette forbindelse til en serverplacering i dit hjemland, før du logger ind på din bank- eller PayPal-konto


### Skal jeg lade min VPN være tændt hele tiden?

Vi anbefaler, at du holder ExpressVPN slået til, hver gang din enhed har forbindelse til internettet, selvom du måske ikke aktivt bruger den. Ved at lade appen køre i baggrunden ved du, at dine personlige data altid er beskyttede.


# Roam the world with a travel eSIM

The world’s most powerful passport—now in your pocket. Connect instantly and effortlessly wherever you go with an eSIM from holiday.com, a travel and lifestyle brand partner of ExpressVPN.

[Get ExpressVPN](https://www.expressvpn.com/pricing)

30-day money-back guarantee for new users



## What is an eSIM?

An eSIM (short for embedded SIM) lets you connect to a cellular network without **requiring a physical SIM card**.

Unlike a roaming plan tied to your home carrier, travel eSIMs connect you to a local carrier in your destination, giving you competitive local rates with better network quality. They’re also incredibly easy to install, and you can switch between different carriers or plans seamlessly.




## Why holiday.com?

ExpressVPN and holiday.com have a shared goal: to ensure savvy travelers have peace of mind, knowing they can stay safely connected while they roam.

For over a decade, ExpressVPN has helped millions of people worldwide take control of their digital experience to gain greater online privacy and flexibility. Partnering with holiday.com to provide eSIMs are a natural extension of that philosophy—bringing convenience, security, and peace of mind to ExpressVPN customers across borders.



### Works anytime, all over

Enter your adventure era with eSIMs for **113 countries**, and even a **global plan** for the ultimate flexibility. Enjoy your trip the way you deserve, with seamless connectivity from city to countryside.



### Ready when you land

Download and set up your eSIM before you leave, and you’ll automatically connect upon arrival without lifting a finger—or worse—fumbling with a physical SIM card.



### Fast, flexible, and affordable

Whether you’re a casual day tripper or serial backpacker, you’ll find a prepaid eSIM plan to suit your needs. Enjoy high-speed service with the best local network providers and lower rates to top it off!



### Easy to use

Choose the data plan you want, activate your eSIM, and you’re all set! Track your data usage and top up easily on the holiday.com app, and never worry about running out of data or paying exorbitant roaming charges.



## FAQ


### Will my device work with holiday.com's eSIM?

As long as your device is compatible with eSIMs and carrier-unlocked, you should be able to set up eSIMs without a hitch. However, devices originating from mainland China, Hong Kong, and Macau do not support eSIMs. If you are unsure, we recommend checking with your device manufacturer directly.


### How do I redeem my holiday.com eSIM?

If holiday.com’s eSIM is included as part of your ExpressVPN subscription, shortly after purchase you will receive a confirmation email with your coupon code and instructions on how to redeem it.
You can also find your coupon code on the ExpressVPN site. After signing in, go to My Account and select Subscription. Under Add-ons, look for your holiday.com eSIM and select View Coupon to display your coupon code and redemption instructions. If you’re having trouble finding your coupon code, please contact Support.


### Does an eSIM protect my privacy?

With an eSIM, there is no need to take the risk of using unsecure public Wi-Fi hotspots in hotels and coffee shops.
Of course, in order to ensure your privacy is protected, we recommend you use an eSIM together with ExpressVPN. That way, you can rest easy knowing your online privacy is protected, no matter where your adventures take you.



## Get your holiday.com eSIM now

Ready to experience extraordinary? Head over to holiday.com, or download the holiday.com app for iOS or Android to get started.

[[Go to holiday.com](https://holiday.com/)](https://holiday.com/)

## How ExpressAI’s secure enclaves

protect your private data

Secure enclaves aren’t a feature of ExpressAI—they’re its foundation. Here’s how our enterprise-grade architecture works.


- ![Expressai 1](https://www.expressvpn.com/wp-ws-cache/uploads-expressvpn/2026/01/expressai-1.png)
                    
                                
                                                                You enter an input. Your data enters an enclave.
When you enter data or upload files, your prompts and files are encrypted on your device with keys only available to you and the secure enclave. Your data can only be used within this secure and private environment.
- ![Refer A Friend](https://www.expressvpn.com/wp-ws-cache/uploads-expressvpn/2026/01/refer-a-friend.png)
                    
                                
                                                                AI processing happens within the enclave.
The AI model you choose runs entirely inside this enclave, thereby processing your prompts in a location where we cannot read, access, or store your data —even if we wanted to. As a privacy-first company, that won’t ever change.
- ![Devices Green Shield 1](https://www.expressvpn.com/wp-ws-cache/uploads-expressvpn/2026/01/devices-green-shield-1.png)
                    
                                
                                                                Your data is wiped when the request is complete.
Once your request is complete, the secure enclave is effectively erased. No prompts, files, or outputs are saved long-term or used for training—because the data is unable to be read outside the enclave. It’s AI without the compromises.

## FAQ


### Does ExpressAI store chat data?

No. ExpressAI uses NVIDIA’s enterprise-grade confidential computing enclaves. All inputs are end-to-end encrypted and processed solely in the enclave’s encrypted memory, so they’re never readable to us. When your session ends, your data disappears completely.


### Does ExpressAI  have a mobile app?

ExpressAI currently offers a web-based mobile experience that works on most smartphones and tablets through your browser. A dedicated iOS or Android app is not available at this time, but the web app is fully optimized for mobile use. Native mobiles are coming soon.


### Can I upload my own AI model to ExpressAI?

Not yet. ExpressAI doesn’t currently support uploading custom AI models, but we know there’s high demand for this feature and are working hard to add it. We’ll share updates as soon as it’s available.


### How is this different from competitors?

ExpressAI is a consumer AI that uses confidential computing architecture. Built on ExpressVPN’s privacy-first principles, it features secure enclaves and zero-access encryption to make long-term retention of your prompts, outputs, and data impossible. We can’t use your data to train the model or profile you, as your prompts are only ever visible to you and readable within the secure enclave.

[Get ExpressAI](https://www.expressvpn.com/pricing?product_type=express_ai)

## FAQ


### How do I know my emails have been forwarded successfully?

On ExpressVPN Advanced and Express Pro plans, you have the ability to view delivery attempts, so you can check that your emails have been forwarded and replied to successfully.


### Why should ExpressVPN subscribers use ExpressMailGuard?

ExpressMailGuard extends ExpressVPN’s privacy commitment to your inbox. Email is one of the most common ways personal data gets compromised. By forwarding your emails, and letting you reply to communications through the greater anonymity of aliases, you protect your identity and are less exposes to spam, phishing attacks, and data brokers.


### What happens if I cancel my ExpressVPN subscription?

ExpressMailGuard is an added-value feature included with ExpressVPN plans. If you cancel your ExpressVPN subscription, access to ExpressMailGuard will end on the same date your ExpressVPN service ends.


### Try a risk-free 30-day trial  of ExpressMailGuard

As part of ExpressVPN’s growing suite of products and features, ExpressMailGuard benefits from the same 30-day money-back guarantee as our core VPN. This means if you’re a new user and not satisfied using ExpressVPN, contact Support within 30 days and get a full refund.

## Core ExpressVPN privacy and security features

Essential safeguards that help protect your data across every connection

![Trusted Server Technology@2x 43](https://www.expressvpn.com/wp-ws-cache/uploads-expressvpn/2025/10/trusted-server-technology@2x-43.png)


### TrustedServer technology with RAM-only servers

Your browsing activity and [connection logs are never stored](https://www.expressvpn.com/what-is-vpn/policy-towards-logs). ExpressVPN’s [TrustedServer technology](https://www.expressvpn.com/features/trustedserver) operates on volatile memory (RAM), removing all server data on every reboot. No user activity ever touches a hard drive, so nothing persists between your VPN sessions.

Each reboot loads the latest, verified software, supporting consistent security across the entire network and reducing the risk of outdated configurations.

![Dns Leak Protection@2x](https://www.expressvpn.com/wp-ws-cache/uploads-expressvpn/2026/03/dns-leak-protection@2x.png)


### Strong encryption standard for secure connections

ExpressVPN encrypts your internet traffic using 256-bit AES encryption, helping protect your data from interception and unwanted monitoring. This keeps your online activity private, whether you’re using shared or home networks.

By encrypting your traffic, ExpressVPN also makes it harder for ISPs to see what your connection is being used for. This can help reduce [content-based ISP throttling](https://www.expressvpn.com/features/isp-throttling), so your speeds stay consistent when streaming, gaming, or downloading large files.

![Laptop Rocket](https://www.expressvpn.com/wp-ws-cache/uploads-expressvpn/2026/03/laptop-rocket.png)


### Lightway protocol supports secure, high-speed connections

Lightway is ExpressVPN’s proprietary protocol designed with security at its core. It uses modern cryptography and a streamlined codebase that is easier to audit and maintain, helping reduce the risk of vulnerabilities.

Because the [Lightway protocol](https://www.expressvpn.com/lightway) is efficient by design, it also delivers faster connections and better stability. It connects quickly, switches smoothly between Wi-Fi and mobile networks, and uses fewer system resources, which helps improve performance and battery life on mobile devices.

![Kill Switch Split Tunneling@2x](https://www.expressvpn.com/wp-ws-cache/uploads-expressvpn/2026/03/kill-switch-split-tunneling@2x.png)


### Internet Kill Switch

ExpressVPN’s [Internet Kill Switch](https://www.expressvpn.com/features/network-lock) is designed to protect your data if your VPN connection drops unexpectedly. When this happens, it automatically blocks all internet traffic, preventing your real IP address or unencrypted data from leaking until the VPN connection is restored.

This ensures your privacy stays intact during network changes, unstable Wi-Fi, or brief connection interruptions. The kill switch works quietly in the background, so you stay protected without needing to take action or constantly monitor your connection.

![Linux Machines Icon](https://www.expressvpn.com/wp-ws-cache/uploads-expressvpn/2026/03/linux-machines-icon.png)


### Leak protection and private DNS servers

If you’re wondering which VPN offers the best IP masking features, ExpressVPN prevents IP address, DNS, and WebRTC leaks with built-in safeguards.

ExpressVPN also runs its own private, zero-knowledge DNS on every server. This means your DNS requests stay encrypted and handled internally, rather than being sent to third-party DNS providers. The result is tighter control over your data and fewer opportunities for information to leak.

![Laptop Two Cercles](https://www.expressvpn.com/wp-ws-cache/uploads-expressvpn/2026/03/laptop-two-cercles.png)


### Automatic obfuscation on every server

Network filters and firewalls can block VPN traffic. Obfuscation keeps your connection working. ExpressVPN uses automatic obfuscation on supported platforms to keep your connection stable when networks attempt to block or interfere with VPN traffic.

This feature activates without any action on your part, letting you access your accounts on school, work, hotel, and public Wi-Fi networks with enhanced privacy.


## ExpressVPN features for high-performance connections

Intelligent technology to support high-bandwidth activity


- Global network optimized for fast connections
                                                    
                        
                                                    
                                ![Expressvpn Blocked@2x 2](https://www.expressvpn.com/wp-ws-cache/uploads-expressvpn/2026/03/expressvpn-blocked@2x-2.png)
                            
                        
                        
                            
                                                            **Why it matters:**
 Stable connection to stream, play, work remotely, and make video calls without interruptions.
ExpressVPN combines the ultra-fast Lightway protocol with 40Gbps and 10Gbps servers in 113 countries to deliver consistent, high-speed connections. You get fast playback and minimal lag with [ExpressVPN’s high-speed VPN connections](https://www.expressvpn.com/features/fastest-vpn) and servers close to your location.
- Unlimited VPN bandwidth supports heavy usage
                                                    
                        
                                                    
                                ![Unlimited Bandwidth@2x](https://www.expressvpn.com/wp-ws-cache/uploads-expressvpn/2026/03/unlimited-bandwidth@2x.png)
                            
                        
                        
                            
                                                            **Why it matters:** Stay connected despite binge-watching shows all week or downloading large files.
ExpressVPN [never caps your bandwidth](https://www.expressvpn.com/features/unlimited-vpn-bandwidth) or throttles your connection for consuming large amounts of data. Stream 4K videos, move large files, and run multiple devices at once without hitting data limits or experiencing slower speeds.
- Split tunneling for VPN protection flexibility
                                                    
                        
                                                    
                                ![Split Tunneling@2x](https://www.expressvpn.com/wp-ws-cache/uploads-expressvpn/2026/03/split-tunneling@2x.png)
                            
                        
                        
                            
                                                            **Why it matters: **Access local printers and smart home devices as usual while securing apps that need VPN protection.
[Split tunneling](https://www.expressvpn.com/features/split-tunneling) lets you route some apps through ExpressVPN while allowing others to use your regular internet connection. This way, you can keep printers, NAS drives, and smart home devices accessible while maintaining VPN protection for browsing, streaming, or banking.
- Dedicated IP addresses provide consistency
                                                    
                        
                                                    
                                ![Fast Location@2x](https://www.expressvpn.com/wp-ws-cache/uploads-expressvpn/2026/03/fast-location@2x.png)
                            
                        
                        
                            
                                                            **Why it matters: **Get an exclusive IP address that reduces login checks and works better with business platforms.
ExpressVPN’s [Dedicated IP](https://www.expressvpn.com/features/dedicated-ip) gives you the same IP address every time you connect to a specific VPN server, reducing CAPTCHA prompts and IP-based login flags. Remote work platforms, business tools, and gaming services can recognize your IP address, reducing friction during sign-ins.

[Try ExpressVPN Features](https://www.expressvpn.com/pricing)


## Network-level protection and filtering features

Reduce noise, trackers, and unwanted threats

![Security Is Not Built Into The Internet@2x](https://www.expressvpn.com/wp-ws-cache/uploads-expressvpn/2026/03/security-is-not-built-into-the-internet@2x.png)


### Ad blocker reduces clutter when browsing sites

ExpressVPN’s [ad blocker](https://www.expressvpn.com/features/ad-blocker) filters intrusive ads and pop-ups that slow down page loading and distract from what you’re reading.

Because it blocks ad domains at the DNS level, these elements never load in the first place. This creates a better browsing experience on ad-heavy news platforms, blogs, and shopping sites. It also helps you save more on data expenses.

![Threat Manager Blocklist](https://www.expressvpn.com/wp-ws-cache/uploads-expressvpn/2026/03/threat-manager-blocklist.png)


### Threat Manager for tracker-blocking controls

[Threat Manager](https://www.expressvpn.com/features/threat-manager) focuses specifically on blocking communication between apps or websites and third-party trackers known to collect or misuse user data.

We regularly update our blocklist to prevent even the latest tracker servers and malicious websites from communicating with your device. Tracker blocker is included in the Advanced and Express Pro tiers.

![Aircove Parental Controls](https://www.expressvpn.com/wp-ws-cache/uploads-expressvpn/2026/03/aircove-parental-controls.svg)


### Parental controls to protect the entire family

[Parental controls](https://www.expressvpn.com/features/parental-controls) let you filter adult or unsafe content across connected devices, supporting kid-friendly browsing without constant supervision. Adult site blocker is included in the Advanced and Express Pro tiers.

You can choose categories based on your household’s needs, and apply filtering across your entire home network.

[Try ExpressVPN Features](https://www.expressvpn.com/pricing)


## Secure your passwords with ExpressKeys

A safer, simpler way to manage the credentials you use every day, built as a standalone app


- ![Xvkeys 1@2x](https://www.expressvpn.com/wp-ws-cache/uploads-expressvpn/2026/03/xvkeys-1@2x.png)
                            
                        
                        
                            
                                                            Store and protect
Save unlimited passwords, payment details, and notes securely with zero-knowledge encryption. Only you can see or unlock your information (online and offline), not even ExpressVPN can read it.
- ![Xvkeys 2](https://www.expressvpn.com/wp-ws-cache/uploads-expressvpn/2026/03/xvkeys-2.svg)
                            
                        
                        
                            
                                                            Sign in faster
No more trying to remember login IDs or reset forgotten passwords. ExpressKeys auto-fills your details and supports passkeys so you can log in quickly. You can also unlock the app with biometrics instead of your vault password.
- ![Xvkeys 3@2x](https://www.expressvpn.com/wp-ws-cache/uploads-expressvpn/2026/03/xvkeys-3@2x.png)
                            
                        
                        
                            
                                                            Create stronger credentials
[ExpressKeys](https://www.expressvpn.com/keys) can generate strong, unique passwords for better security. It also keeps an eye on your password health and alerts you if any credentials are weak or exposed.
- ![Xvkeys 4@2x](https://www.expressvpn.com/wp-ws-cache/uploads-expressvpn/2026/03/xvkeys-4@2x.png)
                            
                        
                        
                            
                                                            Add an extra layer of security

## Automate your VPN with ExpressVPN’s MCP server

Manage your VPN through automation and natural language

![Mcp 1](https://www.expressvpn.com/wp-ws-cache/uploads-expressvpn/2025/07/mcp-1.png)


### A secure, local bridge between AI tools and your VPN

The [ExpressVPN MCP server](https://www.expressvpn.com/features/mcp-server) lets you use your AI coding tools to manage VPN settings. It’s fully opt-in, and once enabled, it runs locally and rejects all remote connections. This means that your AI tools can interact with your VPN without accessing your account data or activity.

![Mcp 2](https://www.expressvpn.com/wp-ws-cache/uploads-expressvpn/2025/07/mcp-2.png)


### Automate routine VPN tasks without breaking your workflow

Once connected, MCP-compatible tools like Claude Code and Codex can perform the VPN actions you’d normally handle yourself—checking your connection state, verifying protocol settings, switching regions, or confirming kill switch status. You can stay focused on your work while your AI assistant manages the network layer in the background.

![Mcp 3](https://www.expressvpn.com/wp-ws-cache/uploads-expressvpn/2025/07/mcp-3.png)


### Troubleshoot faster with AI-assisted diagnostics

When your connection slows down or a configuration isn’t behaving as expected, the MCP server lets your AI tool run diagnostic checks. It can review your protocol, DNS configuration, server selection, and Advanced Protection settings, then explain what’s affecting your connection. This gives you fast, consistent troubleshooting without manually testing each step yourself.

![Mcp 4](https://www.expressvpn.com/wp-ws-cache/uploads-expressvpn/2025/07/mcp-4.png)


### Control your VPN with natural-language prompts

With MCP, your AI assistant can understand instructions like "connect to the UK," "check my security," or "run a quick diagnostic." It performs these actions locally, turning everyday VPN changes into quick, conversational tasks that don’t disrupt your workflow.


## What features make a VPN trustworthy?

Understand what the main security features of a VPN are and how they define a secure, premium service

![Quick Private Connections](https://www.expressvpn.com/wp-ws-cache/uploads-expressvpn/2026/03/quick-private-connections.svg)


### Safe protocols and encryption standards

**Why it matters:** Your data needs privacy and security against cyber criminals, especially on public Wi-Fi.

ExpressVPN uses 256-bit AES encryption paired with trusted protocols like OpenVPN and WireGuard. Lightway, our proprietary protocol, delivers even faster speeds with strong security.

![Secure And Transparent Image](https://www.expressvpn.com/wp-ws-cache/uploads-expressvpn/2026/03/secure-and-transparent-image.png)


### Independent security practices and reviews

**Why it matters: **Trust requires proof, not promises, that our apps are safe to use and our systems work as designed.

ExpressVPN undergoes regular third-party audits by firms like PwC, Cure53, and KPMG. These independent reviews verify our no-logs policy, test our TrustedServer technology, and confirm our security protocols meet industry standards. [All reports are publicly available](https://www.expressvpn.com/trust).

## ExpressVPN features vs. free VPN features

Which VPN offers the strongest security features?


|  | ExpressVPN | Free VPNs (typical) |
| --- | --- | --- | 
| **No-logs policy
** | Strict no-logs policy with transparent and published audit reports | Broad, vague policy; your data may be logged or shared | 
| **Server technology
** | RAM-only servers and TrustedServer technology remove all session data on reboot | Disk-based servers that can retain data long-term | 
| **Encryption** | 256-bit AES encryption across all apps | Often uses weaker or unspecified encryption levels | 
| **Protocols** | OpenVPN, WireGuard, and Lightway for stability and speed | Limited protocol selection; may rely on older, slower methods | 
| **Leak protection** | Built-in IP/DNS/WebRTC leak safeguards | Inconsistent or missing leak protection features | 
| **Internet Kill Switch** | Kill switch included on supported platforms | Often unavailable or inconsistent | 
| **Speed performance** | Lightning-fast with up to 40Gbps servers and a speed-optimized protocol | Congested servers that slow during peak hours | 
| **Included extras** | ExpressKeys password manager, ad and tracker blocker, parental controls, ExpressMailGuard, ExpressAI, and more | Rarely includes added features or tools beyond basic encryption and IP masking | 
| **Device coverage** | Up to 14 simultaneous connections; apps for phones, laptops, smart TVs, and Fire TV Stick | Limited simultaneous connections and device support | 
| **Customer support** | 24/7 live chat assistance with real experts | Basic email support or no real-time help |

## FAQs about VPN features

Essential explanations to help you choose the right VPN tools


### Which VPN features should I look for in a VPN?

The most important features include strong encryption, a trusted no-logs approach, leak protection, fast protocols, and broad device support. ExpressVPN combines AES-256 encryption, Lightway, private DNS, and RAM-only servers to help you maintain consistent security and performance across streaming, work, and daily browsing.


### Is a kill switch necessary?

Yes, a kill switch adds protection during unexpected dropouts by blocking traffic until your VPN connection is restored. ExpressVPN's Internet Kill Switch prevents IP address exposure when your VPN disconnects, especially on public Wi-Fi or when handling sensitive work data.


### Do I need a dedicated IP?

Not necessarily, but a dedicated IP can help when services require consistent login behavior on remote work tools, banking, or gaming platforms. ExpressVPN offers dedicated IPs with the Express Pro plan, giving you a stable address that reduces CAPTCHA prompts and login interruptions caused by frequently changing IPs.


### How many and which devices can ExpressVPN cover?

ExpressVPN supports up to 14 active connections, including phones, laptops, tablets, smart TVs, and gaming consoles.


### How do trials and guarantees work with ExpressVPN?

New subscribers can try ExpressVPN with a 30-day money-back guarantee*. It's enough time to test all the features in your subscription across your devices. To request a refund, contact our support team, available 24/7.
**Users who purchased their subscriptions through the Apple App Store (iTunes) or the Google Play Store do not have access to the ExpressVPN 30-day money-back guarantee. Instead, users can request refunds through the App Store or Play Store, at Apple’s or Google’s discretion.*


### Can I use VPN for streaming content?

Yes. ExpressVPN secures your connection while streaming on your existing accounts. Our 40Gbps and 10Gbps servers and Lightway protocol deliver stable performance for HD and 4K streaming. Results may vary by region, device, and network conditions.


### How fast is ExpressVPN compared to other VPNs?

ExpressVPN ranks among the fastest VPNs because the network is optimized for high-bandwidth activities. Many services cause noticeable slowdowns that affect streaming, gaming, and video calls. However, ExpressVPN supports fast performance through the Lightway protocol, 40Gbps and 10Gbps servers, and continuous network optimization across global locations.

## High-performance VPN for fast-paced gaming

Designed to stay responsive when every millisecond counts


- Stable ping for online matches
- Optimized for mobile gaming
- Smarter routing to game servers

![Bypass Isp Throttling 4](https://www.expressvpn.com/wp-ws-cache/uploads-expressvpn/2026/03/bypass-isp-throttling-4.png)

Ping measures how quickly your actions reach the game server and return responses. When it’s below 100 ms, the game feels more responsive. But when you use a VPN that’s not optimized for real-time play, it can go above 100 ms and result in delays.

ExpressVPN is an ideal gaming VPN for fast-paced games like FPS, MOBA, and esports. It has high-capacity 10 and 40 Gbps servers to reduce congestion, which helps maintain low latency. Its proprietary [Lightway protocol](https://www.expressvpn.com/lightway) is lightweight and minimizes processing delay compared to older VPN protocols.

![Xv Mobile Gaming 2](https://www.expressvpn.com/wp-ws-cache/uploads-expressvpn/2026/03/xv-mobile-gaming-2.png)

If you often play online games on your smartphone or tablet, you likely switch between mobile and free public Wi-Fi networks. This can affect your gameplay when connected to a VPN, as it may take longer to re-establish connection.

ExpressVPN’s Lightway is designed to make the [fastest VPN](https://www.expressvpn.com/features/fastest-vpn) connection possible, minimize overhead, and adapt quickly to network changes. This gaming VPN protocol also preserves battery life when playing all-consuming games like [Pokémon GO](https://www.expressvpn.com/gaming/pokemon-go) for a long time.

![Get A Private Ip Address Croatia 5](https://www.expressvpn.com/wp-ws-cache/uploads-expressvpn/2026/03/get-a-private-ip-address-croatia-5.png)

Sometimes, your ISP may route your traffic through multiple intermediate networks before it arrives at a game server. If these routes are too long or congested, you’ll experience higher latency, and your game may suffer.

To help with this, ExpressVPN offers servers in 214+ locations worldwide. The wide selection allows you to choose a potentially less congested, shorter path for your data. As a result, your connection becomes faster and more stable for steady gaming.

## FAQs about gaming VPNs

Find the answers you need to sign up for ExpressVPN


### Can I use a VPN for gaming?

Absolutely! They work just fine. A lot of casual and professional players use VPNs to improve their connection and add a layer of security to their gaming sessions. Most gaming platforms and publishers are also fine with it, as long as you don’t use a VPN to cheat, get around regional pricing, or circumvent the systems they have in place.


### Will using a VPN lower my ping or reduce lag?

It depends. If the lag is caused by poor routing or content-based ISP throttling, a VPN can help. However, if you play on servers that are too far away or just have poor internet quality, a VPN can't do much to help.


### How does a VPN affect game server routing and latency?

A VPN changes the path your traffic takes before reaching the game servers. This can add slight latency, but in some cases it avoids inefficient or congested routes, resulting in more stable ping.


### Can I play on servers in another region with a VPN?

Yes, in some games. Many online games let players matchmake across regions or select regional servers. A VPN can change where your connection appears to originate, which may affect matchmaking. Availability, performance, and rules vary by game, and higher latency can impact gameplay.


### Can I use a free VPN or should I pay?

Technically, you can but we don't recommend it. Free VPNs often have overcrowded servers and a short list of server locations. These make it hard to play with decent speeds, and in the region you want. They also sometimes collect your data in order to sell.
ExpressVPN has plenty of fast servers, and a proven no-logs policy. Try it risk-free with a 30-day money-back guarantee if it's your first time.


### Are there specific VPN protocols or settings that work better for gaming?

Yes. Lightweight, modern protocols designed for speed and quick reconnections work best for real-time games. ExpressVPN’s Lightway protocol is built to reduce overhead, reconnect quickly, and maintain stable performance during fast-paced matches. It's also game-ready with no manual settings adjustments required.

## Why use a VPN in everyday life?

Secure your online activity on any network


- Protect yourself on public Wi-Fi
Connecting through the Wi-Fi at places like Starbucks, hotels, or airports makes your traffic more vulnerable to hackers. [VPN encryption](https://www.expressvpn.com/what-is-vpn/vpn-encryption) shields your traffic, keeping your logins, banking details, and other sensitive data private on shared networks.
- Keep your personal data and activity private
ISPs can monitor much of what you do online. Encrypting your traffic keeps your browsing private from ISPs.
Third-party trackers may also follow you around the web. [Masking your IP address](https://www.expressvpn.com/what-is-my-ip/hide-my-ip) with a shared VPN IP address makes it harder to link your online activity to you.
- Get more consistent connections for daily tasks
[Content-based throttling](https://www.expressvpn.com/features/isp-throttling) from ISPs can interrupt everyday browsing, gaming, or streaming. Encryption helps you avoid this by preventing ISPs from identifying what you’re doing online. ISPs will only detect that you’re connected to a VPN server.

## How to tell if your VPN is working

How to check if your VPN is working properly: A changed IP address verifies that ExpressVPN is active.


## Everyday VPN use inside the ExpressVPN app

What is ExpressVPN used for? Explore relevant features for your daily browsing


- Stay protected with Auto-Connect
Switching between mobile data and café Wi-Fi at places like Starbucks is safer with Auto-Connect.
This feature automatically activates ExpressVPN the moment you join untrusted networks. All you have to do is toggle it on to enable this automatic protection.
- Prevent exposure with Internet Kill Switch
If the Wi-Fi drops at busy places like airports or hotels, [Internet Kill Switch](https://www.expressvpn.com/features/network-lock) prevents traffic from leaving your device until the VPN connection is re-established.
This helps you avoid accidentally exposing your IP address and data on unstable networks.


- Control which apps use the VPN with split tunneling
[Split tunneling](https://www.expressvpn.com/features/split-tunneling) gives you control over which apps through the VPN for added privacy and which ones bypass it, helping you balance speed and protection.
You can set streaming apps, for example, to bypass the VPN on your regular connection while banking apps or browsers use ExpressVPN.
- Block trackers and threats with Threat Manager
Browsing ad-heavy sites like large news outlets is safer with [Threat Manager](https://www.expressvpn.com/features/threat-manager).
By preventing known trackers and malicious domains from loading on apps and websites, you reduce unwanted data collection and security risks.

## FAQ about how to use a VPN

Find simple explanations for the most important VPN questions



### Is ExpressVPN easy to use for beginners?

Yes, ExpressVPN is easy for beginners. The intuitive app installs and connects within minutes, with key features like encryption and IP masking working automatically in the background. You stay protected on home, public, and mobile networks while you browse, shop, or bank online.


### When should I turn on ExpressVPN? Should I leave it on?

ExpressVPN is most helpful whenever you browse, shop, or bank online, especially on public Wi-Fi in cafés, airports, or coworking spaces. Many people keep ExpressVPN on throughout the day because consistent encryption and IP masking support more private, uninterrupted activity across mobile and home networks.


### How do I know if ExpressVPN is turned on?

You can tell ExpressVPN is active by checking the connection status at the top of the app, which changes once your VPN tunnel is secured. A new IP address also appears beneath the connection button, confirming your traffic routes through an encrypted ExpressVPN server.


### Do I need to adjust any settings to start using it?

ExpressVPN works immediately after sign-in, so most people browse without adjusting anything. Optional tools like Auto-Connect or Threat Manager appear in the settings if you want extra protection on networks at cafés, train stations, or local ISPs. The app highlights these features in simple sections.


### What should I do if the VPN disconnects while I’m online?

A brief network drop usually reconnects quickly, especially on mobile networks. To prevent risk of exposure, enable the Internet Kill Switch feature to block traffic until the secure VPN tunnel reestablishes. Reconnection happens automatically, allowing you to continue browsing without restarting activity.


### Can I use ExpressVPN on multiple devices at the same time?

Yes, ExpressVPN supports connections on up to 14 devices at once, which helps when you switch between your phone, laptop, and smart TV at home or while traveling.


### Does a VPN actually keep me private from ISPs, apps, and websites?

A VPN encrypts traffic between your device and the VPN server, which helps you avoid ISPmonitoring. Apps and websites may still collect information through logins or cookies, but ExpressVPN reduces what they access by masking your IP address and blocking known trackers through Threat Manager.


### Will my connection slow down after turning on a VPN?

Some speed changes can occur when using VPNs because traffic is encrypted and travels through a secure tunnel. However, our speed-optimized Lightway protocol helps maintain fast, stable performance. You can also opt for nearby servers to keep slowdowns minimal.


### How do I install and start using a VPN on my device?

You can either download ExpressVPN's native apps from the main website or through your device’s official app store. You can sign into the app with your credentials and select a server. ExpressVPN also offers different setup options for different VPN use cases, like browser extensions.

## What is a VPN?

A **VPN**, or** virtual private network**, is a secure tunnel between your device and the internet. VPNs protect you from snooping, interference, and censorship.

As you connect to a secure VPN server, your internet traffic goes through an encrypted tunnel that nobody can see into—including hackers, governments, and your internet service provider.

## Benefits and advantages of VPN


### Change your location

Using a VPN **changes your IP address**, the unique number that identifies you and where you are in the world. A new IP address makes it harder to determine your identity and real location. With ExpressVPN, you can appear to be in the UK, U.S., Canada, Australia, or any of [113 countries](https://www.expressvpn.com/vpn-server).


### Protect your privacy

Changing your IP address with a VPN helps **shield your identity** from websites, apps, and services that want to track you. Good VPNs also prevent your internet provider, mobile carrier, and anyone else who may be listening from seeing your activity, thanks to a layer of strong encryption.


### Increase your security

Using a VPN **protects you from security breaches** in many forms, including packet sniffing, rogue Wi-Fi networks, and man-in-the-middle attacks. Travelers, remote workers, and all kinds of on-the-go individuals use a VPN whenever they’re on an untrusted network like free public Wi-Fi.

[[Get ExpressVPN](https://www.expressvpn.com/pricing)](https://www.expressvpn.com/pricing)

## When should I use a VPN?

If privacy is important to you, you should use a VPN **every time you connect to the internet**. A VPN app runs in the background of your device so it won’t get in the way while you use other apps and browse the internet. And you’ll have peace of mind knowing your privacy is always protected.

But here are some situations in which a VPN is especially useful:


- While traveling
Exploring the world doesn’t mean you have to change the way you use the internet. A VPN lets you use the internet as if you were still in your home country, no matter how far you travel.
- While having fun
A VPN lets you enjoy the sites and services you like without ISP throttling that could detract from your experience or outright blocking by your ISP or local Wi-Fi network.
- While on public Wi-Fi
Connecting to public Wi-Fi hotspots like those in cafes, airports, and parks could leave your private information vulnerable. Using a VPN on your devices keeps you safe with strong encryption.
- While gaming
Using a VPN unlocks games, maps, skins, and other add-ons that might be restricted on your network. It also shields you from DDoS attacks and reduces ping and overall lag.
- While file-sharing
P2P file sharing usually means that strangers can see your IP address and possibly track your downloads. A VPN keeps your IP address private, letting you download with increased anonymity.
- While shopping
Some online stores show different prices to people in different countries. With a VPN, you can find the best deals in the world no matter where you’re shopping from.


## How does a VPN work?

To understand how a VPN works, it helps to first understand how your internet connection works without one.


### Without a VPN

When you access a website without a VPN, you are being connected to that site through your internet service provider, or ISP. The ISP assigns you a **unique IP address** that can be used to identify you to the website. Because your ISP is handling and directing all your traffic, it can see which websites you visit. And your activity can be linked to you by that unique IP address.


### With a VPN

When you connect to the internet with a VPN, the VPN app on your device (also called a **VPN client**) establishes a secure connection with a **VPN server**. Your traffic still passes through your ISP, but your ISP can no longer read it or see its final destination. The websites you visit can no longer see your original IP address, only the IP address of the VPN server, which is shared by many other users and changes regularly.


- Not Connected                    
                    
                        Connected
- 


### Proxying

The VPN server acts like a **proxy**, or stand-in, for your web activity: Instead of your real IP address and location, websites you visit will only see the IP address and location of the VPN server.

This makes you more **anonymous** on the internet.


### Authentication

Establishing a secure connection is a tricky problem solved by clever mathematics in a process called **authentication**.

Once authenticated, the VPN client and VPN server can be sure they are talking to each other and no one else.


### Tunneling

VPNs also protect the connection between client and server with tunneling and encryption.

Tunneling is a process by which each data packet is **encapsulated** inside another data packet. This makes it harder for third parties to read in transit.


### Encryption

Data inside the tunnel is also **encrypted** in such a way that only the intended recipient can decrypt it. This keeps the contents of your internet traffic completely private. Even your internet service provider won’t see it.

## Types of VPN


- Commercial VPN
A commercial VPN, also called a personal VPN or a consumer VPN, is a private service offered directly to individuals, usually for a fee.
ExpressVPN is such a VPN service because it directly caters to the privacy needs of its customers.
- Corporate VPN
A corporate VPN, also called a business VPN, allows an organization’s remote employees to connect securely to the internet as if they were physically present in the office.
Unlike commercial VPNs, however, corporate VPNs are meant to protect the privacy of the company and not necessarily the individual.
- Self-setup VPN
Some tech experts and DIY hobbyists choose to set up their own VPN using their own equipment.
Self-setup VPNs, however, do not provide the protection of shared IP addresses, server locations in multiple countries, or many other features enjoyed by commercial VPN users.


## FAQ


### Why is ExpressVPN one of the best VPN providers?

ExpressVPN is consistently rated as one of the best VPN providers for its commitment to privacy, speed, and reliability. With a no-logs policy audited by independent firms, your online activities remain private - even from us. Our network of servers in more than 113 countries delivers fast, secure connections, whether you're streaming, gaming, or browsing. Advanced TrustedServer technology ensures data is never written to hard drives, further enhancing security.


### How to choose a VPN provider?

Choosing a VPN provider depends on your needs. Prioritize privacy features like a no-logs policy, encryption, and a kill switch. Look for fast servers and a large number of server locations to ensure smooth streaming, gaming, and bypassing geographic restrictions. For censorship resistance, choose a VPN with proven reliability in restricted regions. Finally, ensure the VPN supports your devices and offers 24/7 customer support.


### What are the most important things when it comes to VPN?

Strong security, fast speeds, wide server locations, and reliable connections are among a VPN's most important features. Look for advanced encryption, a no-logs policy, and a kill switch for privacy. Choose a VPN with high-speed servers and global coverage to ensure smooth browsing and streaming.


### Are VPNs legal?

Yes, VPNs are legal in most countries and are commonly used by individuals and businesses to protect privacy and secure online activity. However, some countries with strict internet regulations may restrict or monitor VPN use. Always check local laws if you’re unsure. Keep in mind, using a VPN doesn’t make illegal activities legal.


### Is ExpressVPN trustworthy?

Yes, ExpressVPN is highly trustworthy. Its strict no-logs policy, independently audited by third-party firms, ensures your online activity is never recorded. Advanced security features like AES-256 encryption and TrustedServer technology protect your data, while past legal cases have proven there’s no user data to share. These safeguards demonstrate ExpressVPN’s commitment to privacy and transparency.


### Why choose ExpressVPN over a free VPN?

Free VPNs often come with risks like logging your data, injecting ads, or selling your browsing history. In contrast, ExpressVPN offers fast, reliable connections with no bandwidth caps, advanced encryption for privacy, global server coverage in 113 countries, and 24/7 customer support. For security and performance, a premium VPN is the safer choice.


### Can VPN bypass censorship?

Yes, VPNs can bypass censorship by encrypting your internet traffic and routing it through secure servers in other countries. This masks your real IP address, making it appear as though you’re browsing from a different location. Advanced VPNs also use obfuscation technology to bypass firewalls in heavily restricted regions, ensuring access to blocked websites and apps.


### Which devices does ExpressVPN support?

ExpressVPN supports Windows, Mac, iOS, Android, Linux, Apple TV, Android TV, Fire Stick TV, and more. You can also use the Aircove router with built-in VPN functionality to protect all Wi-Fi devices, including game consoles, smart doorbells, and voice assistants.


### Can I use ExpressVPN while traveling or on vacation?

Yes, ExpressVPN is ideal for traveling. It secures your internet connection on public Wi-Fi, protecting your data with advanced encryption. You can access online services from your home country, such as streaming platforms or banking apps, no matter where you are. Additionally, ExpressVPN helps you bypass regional restrictions, allowing you to unlock websites and apps that may be blocked in your location

## FAQs: About ExpressKeys

Learn more about ExpressKeys and make the switch with confidence


### What is ExpressKeys?

ExpressKeys is a secure password manager that stores your passwords, cards, and notes in an encrypted vault. It works on mobile devices and browsers, and helps you sign in quickly with autofill. It used to be known as ExpressVPN Keys, but has now been upgraded to a standalone app.


### Is ExpressKeys included with ExpressVPN?

ExpressKeys is included with ExpressVPN Advanced and Express Pro tiers. You'll need an active ExpressVPN subscription to set it up for the first time, though note you will retain access to credentials stored with ExpressKeys even if your ExpressVPN subscription expires.


### How secure is ExpressKeys?

ExpressKeys is designed with security in mind. Your vault is encrypted using keys created on your device, and your vault password never leaves it. This means only you can access your saved passwords, passkeys, cards, and other sensitive information.


### Can I import passwords from other managers?

Yes. You can import passwords from popular password managers like LastPass, 1Password, Dashlane, Bitwarden, iCloud Keychain, and most browser-based managers. Follow our [step-by-step guide for your current password manager](https://www.expressvpn.com/support/knowledge-hub/import-existing-data-to-expresskeys/).


### Does ExpressKeys support 2FA codes?

Yes. ExpressKeys can generate 2FA codes for supported accounts, so you can manage passwords and authentication in one place.


### What are passkeys?

Passkeys are a modern alternative to passwords that can help protect against phishing and credential theft. Instead of signing in with a password, you verify your identity using a fingerprint, face scan, or another authentication method. ExpressKeys lets you create, store, and manage passkeys alongside your passwords in the same secure vault.


### Should I use my browser as a password manager?

Saving your passwords in your browsers like Chrome, Safari, Firefox, and Opera may be convenient, but dedicated password managers generally provide stronger security features and more control over how your credentials are protected.


### How does ExpressKeys prevent phishing?

ExpressKeys autofills only when the website domain matches the one saved in your vault. This helps prevent entering passwords on fake or lookalike sites trying to steal your login credentials.


### How do I transfer my passwords from the old ExpressVPN Keys?

Download and install the ExpressKeys app. If you are signed into the ExpressVPN app and have used ExpressVPN Keys on your current device, you will be automatically signed into ExpressKeys. Unlock ExpressKeys and you will find all your existing logins, credit cards, and secure notes in the new app.

# Lightway: A modern VPN protocol by ExpressVPN

Delivering a VPN experience that’s faster, more secure, and more reliable. It’s Lightway, now on ExpressVPN apps for Android, iOS, Windows, Mac, Linux, and routers.

[Get ExpressVPN](https://www.expressvpn.com/pricing)


## What is Lightway?

Lightway is ExpressVPN’s pioneering VPN protocol, built for an always-on world. It makes your VPN experience speedier, more secure, and more reliable than ever. Designed to be light on its feet, Lightway runs faster, uses less battery, and is easier to audit and maintain.

A VPN protocol forms the foundation of a VPN service, shaping every aspect of your experience. Most providers use the same off-the-shelf protocols, but ExpressVPN has engineered its own. And we’re constantly improving Lightway, including reimplementing it in the Rust programming language for even greater security and performance.

[[Get ExpressVPN](https://www.expressvpn.com/pricing)](https://www.expressvpn.com/pricing)
## Now coded in Rust

To keep Lightway on the cutting edge, we’ve [reimplemented it from C into Rust](https://www.expressvpn.com/blog/lightway-in-rust/)—a programming language that’s matured in recent years to become one of the most powerful and popular among developers for high-performance systems.

This required a total overhaul of Lightway and the result is a more expressive, better-performing VPN protocol that can be easily improved upon and that others can adopt. Reimplementation in Rust also served to fundamentally enhance Lightway’s security: Because certain threats simply cannot exist in Rust, associated attack vectors and human errors are automatically eliminated.


## Better speed and performance

ExpressVPN has already been ranked the fastest VPN by TechRadar, Tom’s Guide, and others—but Lightway has improved on those speeds. It’s also made it faster to get connected to the VPN, often in just a fraction of a second.

With **Lightway Turbo**, a new toggle within the ExpressVPN app, fast is getting faster. Lightway Turbo uses multi-lane tunneling to send more data simultaneously, further improving download and upload speeds. (Currently available in our Windows app, with other platforms in the works.)

You can also expect more performance features to come, now that Lightway is using a simpler and more expressive code base in Rust.


## Secure and transparent

Lightway uses wolfSSL, whose well-established cryptography library has been extensively vetted by third parties, including against the FIPS 140-2 standard.

The core codebase of Lightway has been [open-sourced](https://www.expressvpn.com/blog/lightway-open-source-security-audit/) and is available on [GitHub](https://github.com/expressvpn/lightway-core), ensuring transparency to our users. Cure53 has also conducted two independent assessments on Lightway to confirm its security—[once in 2021](https://www.expressvpn.com/blog/lightway-open-source-security-audit/) and the [second time in 2022](https://www.expressvpn.com/blog/cure53-lightway-audit/). Following Lightway’s reimplementation in Rust, we also commissioned [new audits](https://www.expressvpn.com/blog/lightway-audits-cure53-praetorian/) by Cure53 and Praetorian in 2024.


## Fewer connection drops

If you’re switching between networks or your signal drops out, Lightway doesn’t skip a beat. That’s because your VPN connection becomes idle, not terminated. Whether you’re switching from Wi-Fi to mobile data or stepping in and out of an elevator, you’ll maintain the same connection, to the same ExpressVPN server.

This means your VPN connection picks up the moment your device gets back online, ensuring no interruptions to your browsing or security. In many common situations, such as waking a device from sleep mode or deactivating airplane mode, the time it takes for the ExpressVPN connection to become active again is virtually imperceptible.


## Post-quantum protection

Advances in the quantum computing space could undermine today’s cryptography, making it possible for encrypted information to be decrypted in the future. But our users have a headstart.

Lightway includes post-quantum protection by default, shielding you against attackers with access to both classical and quantum computers. The protocol now leverages [ML-KEM](https://www.expressvpn.com/blog/ml-kem-lightway-upgrade/), the recently chosen NIST standard for post-quantum encryption, to future-proof users’ data.

# Press Room


## About ExpressVPN

ExpressVPN is the world’s leading consumer privacy brand. Since 2009, we’ve empowered millions of users to take control of their digital experience. The VPN was just the beginning; today, we’re expanding our engineering foundation to bridge the gap between online privacy and real-world safety.Our platform is defined by technical innovation, featuring the open-source Lightway protocol for speed and post-quantum protection, and TrustedServer technology to ensure data never persists on a hard drive.ExpressVPN now protects your credentials with ExpressKeys, a zero-knowledge password manager, and shields your inbox with ExpressMailGuard. For U.S. users, we also provide Identity Defender to help safeguard personal information from fraud. The portfolio extends to business and lifestyle solutions, including ExpressVPN for Teams, the Holiday.com eSIM service, and EventVPN.A vocal advocate for digital rights, ExpressVPN is a proud supporter of nonprofit organizations fighting for internet freedom. ExpressVPN has been part of Kape Technologies since 2021.

## Quick facts & figures


- Our core ExpressVPN service features the open-source Lightway protocol for speed and post-quantum protection against future threats
- ExpressKeys provides zero-knowledge credential management to secure passwords and data.
- ExpressMailGuard delivers inbox privacy to keep communications secure.
- Identity Defender offers a suite for real-world risk monitoring and insurance, available to U.S. users.
- Founded in 2009 and based in the British Virgin Islands, we joined the Kape Technologies family of brands in 2021
- [Our server presence spans 113 countries and over 214+ server locations](https://www.expressvpn.com/vpn-server), covering key geographies like the UK, U.S., Canada, and Australia.
- We provide apps for Windows, Mac, iOS, Android, Linux, Android TV, and Apple TV, alongside extensions for major browsers.
- Strict no-logs policy (no activity or connection logs), independently validated by over 20 third-party audits from firms including KPMG and Cure53.
- 24/7 live chat customer support with real humans
- Advocates for internet privacy and digital rights; proud financial supporters of:
  - The Internet Defense League
  - Fight for the Future
  - OpenMedia
  - Access Now



[Read our release notes to find out what’s new in ExpressVPN’s latest app versions](https://www.expressvpn.com/support/release-notes/)
